name: Autumn's Embrace
description:
Woven by fey seamstresses as rewards for servants of nature, countless leaves continually changing colors in autumnal hues comprise autumn's embrace, a suit of +2 invisibility resilient leaf weave. Leaves shed from the armor as they might fall in autumn. When activating the armor's Invisibility property rune, you disappear in a swirl of colorful leaves.

Activate (2 Actions) (aura, concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You call forth a storm of leaves from autumn's embrace. These leaves swirl in a 20-foot emanation for 1 minute. Creatures within the area are Concealed, and creatures outside the area are concealed to creatures within the leaves. However, you can see through this concealment. You can Dismiss the activation.
